name: Ernest Falk

statedReqs.notes: Selling the family colonial. In no hurry, or so he says.

hiddenPrefs.desc: 'No hurry' is cover — his knees are shot and stairs are becoming unsafe. A true single-level or elevator building would close him fast.
Secretly hopes to stay walkable to the Maple Terrace farmers market where he knows everyone.

intro: Retired shop teacher, widower, drives a truck older than you. Says he'll 'know it when he sees it.'
